kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Edmund belongs to the River Ward or both members of the Joiners' Guild belong to the River Ward (but not both).
12 coins goes with exactly three of Edmund, Fletcher, Mallet, Oldwall, and Bishop.
Either Wulfric goes with Countess, or Chisel goes with Knight — but not both.
Between Aldric and Wulfric, one goes with Fletcher and the other with Mason.
15 coins goes with exactly one of Blacksmith, Highrow, or Millpond.
If Fletcher goes with Aldric, then Sheriff does not go with 15 coins.
Needle goes with neither Carpenter nor Millpond.
The artisan in Eastcheap's levy is lower than both Matilda and the artisan serving the Sheriff.
Exactly one of (the members of the Market Ward and the artisan serving the Countess) goes with (Chisel or Mallet).
The artisan serving the Knight's levy is exactly 2 coins more than Edmund.
The artisan in Millpond's levy is between the Carpenter and the artisan with the Mallet.
Carpenter goes with at least two of Edmund, Loom, Millpond, Sheriff, and 12 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Either Esther belongs to the North Watershed or both members of the Sunfish Family belong to the North Watershed (but not both).
2 lb goes with exactly three of Esther, Pike, Spoon, Willowmere, and Corn.
Either Wade goes with Dough, or Popper goes with Maggot — but not both.
Between Boone and Wade, one goes with Pike and the other with Trout.
8 lb goes with exactly one of Bass, Foxglen, or Stillwater.
If Pike goes with Boone, then Nightcrawler does not go with 8 lb.
Swimbait goes with neither Catfish nor Stillwater.
The angler at Birchpool's weight is lower than both Mabel and the angler fishing with Nightcrawler.
Exactly one of (the members of the East Watershed and the angler fishing with Dough) goes with (Popper or Spoon).
The angler fishing with Maggot's weight is exactly 4 lb more than Esther.
The angler at Stillwater's weight is between the angler who landed the Catfish and the angler using the Spoon.
Catfish goes with at least two of Esther, Spinnerbait, Stillwater, Nightcrawler, and 2 lb.
